heading: Air Station Cape Cod Improvements
label: 906 Air Station Cape Cod Improvements
text: The Secretary may expend funds for the repair, improvement, restoration, or replacement of those federally or nonfederally owned support buildings, including appurtenances, which are on leased or permitted real property constituting Coast Guard Air Station Cape Cod, located on Massachusetts Military Reservation, Cape Cod, Massachusetts.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 671 of this title
amendments: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 671 of this title
